name: Lyhan
description:
'''Trần Thị Thảo Linh{{Efn|This is the full name Lyhan was known by when participating in the show ''The Debut'' in 2018.<ref name="thedebut2" /> Most news sources do not include the word "Thị" when referring to her original name.|name="birthname"}}''' (born April 14, 1999), better known by her stage name '''Lyhan''' (stylized as '''LyHan''' or '''LYHAN'''), is a Vietnamese singer-songwriter. After entering the music scene through the Vietnamese television show ''The Debut'' and collaborating with several artists in the industry, she officially debuted under the [[Universal Music Group|Universal Music]] Vietnam label in November 2024 with the song "Nhân danh tình yêu." 

Lyhan became more widely known after she finished as the runner-up in the first season of the reality TV show ''[[Em xinh "say hi"]]'' in 2025, followed by the release of her debut studio album ''Tâm linh'' in November of that same year. She was the winner of the "Most Popular Female Singer/Rapper" award at the [[Làn Sóng Xanh Music Awards 2025|28th Làn Sóng Xanh Awards]].
